@title ReaderVault
 @notice Manages reader USDC/USYC balance for micro-payments on HumbleHumansHub.
Reader address → USDC float balance
Reader address → USYC staked balance
Reader activity tracking
@notice Deposit USDC (Native). Keeps FLOAT_AMOUNT as liquid USDC; stakes rest into USYC.
@notice Internal logic to deduct funds and route payment.

documentation.text: @notice Withdraw all balances (USDC float + USYC redeemed to USDC).

@title WriterVault
 @notice Accumulates writer earnings from the ReaderVault and auto-stakes into USYC.
Writer address → USYC staked balance
Writer address → total USDC earnings received (for dashboard)
Writer address → total reads count
Writer address → total claps count
Writer address → total comments count
@notice Withdraw all earnings. Redeems USYC → USDC and sends to writer.

@notice Current net asset value per USYC in USDC (6 decimals).
         This increases over time as yield accrues (~5% APR).
